programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/3. The royal family holidays at Fontainebleau, an escape from stifling Versailles. 2022. France. Director: Pete Travis. Starring: Emilia Schule, James Purefoy S1 E3.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/4. The king collapses, and on recovery, decides to grant du Barry status at court - as his queen. 2022. France. Director: Pete Travis. Starring: Emilia Schule, James Purefoy S1 E4.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a killer, they find themselves in a no-man's-land. 2024. US. Director: Elliott Lester. Starring: Peter Dinklage, Juliette Lewis.

programme.title: The End
programme.desc: Years after environmental collapse, a family's idyllic bunker-life crumbles when a stranger arrives. 2024. Germany, Denmark. Director: Joshua Oppenheimer. Starring: Tilda Swinton, George MacKay.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/4. Elin battles the virus affecting her and Moa. Christian faces accusations, Hugo is threatened. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: One of the largest manhunts in modern human history kicks off as two brothers escape 1953 communist Czechoslovakia. 2023. Czech Republic. Director: Tomas Masin. Starring: Oskar Hes, Jan Nedbal.

programme.title: Memoir Of A Snail
programme.desc: A bittersweet memoir of Grace Pudel - hoarder of snails, romance novels, and guinea pigs. 2024. Australia. Director: Adam Elliot. Starring: Jacki Weaver, Sarah Snook, Charlotte Belsey.

programme.title: Rio Connection
programme.desc: 1/5. Legros keeps a secret from Buscetta, and makes a deal with agent Singleton that might spare him from prison. 2023. Brazil. Starring: Valerio Morigi S1 E5.

programme.title: Rio Connection
programme.desc: 1/6. Legros nearly gets exposed when Sarti shows up at his office while encountering an agent there. 2023. Brazil. Starring: Valerio Morigi S1 E6.

programme.title: Rio Connection
programme.desc: 1/7. Everything seems to go wrong for the trio; their business starts to fall apart, and their latest drug shipment comes under threat. 2023. Brazil. Starring: Valerio Morigi S1 E7.

programme.title: Rio Connection
programme.desc: 1/8. Buscetta, Sarti and Legros meet for the last time while their friends are being arrested and their loved ones could be in danger. 2023. Brazil. Starring: Valerio Morigi S1 E8.

programme.title: The Eight Mountains
programme.desc: Two people of different classes forge a decades-long friendship in the Italian Alps. 2022. Italy. Directors: Felix van Groeningen, Charlotte Vandermeersch. Starring: Luca Marinelli.

programme.title: Memoir Of A Snail
programme.desc: A bittersweet memoir of Grace Pudel - hoarder of snails, romance novels, and guinea pigs. 2024. Australia. Director: Adam Elliot. Starring: Jacki Weaver, Sarah Snook, Charlotte Belsey.
